title: Rhytidostemma peruvianum

The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing pain, inflammation, and oxidative stress. Rhytidostemma peruvianum contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, terpenoids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
